# Viven — Video Production Zurich, Switzerland

> Viven (Viven AG) is a Zurich-based video production company producing brand, product, employer-branding, how-to, social and corporate films for Swiss and international brands. Feature-film craft applied to business results, delivered in English, German and Spanish.

Viven has produced video for 187 brands across 32 industries, including UBS, Siemens, Porsche, ON, FIFA and Philips. The studio's founder produced the first Swiss feature film released on Netflix. Viven holds a 5.0 rating on Google across 47 reviews. A typical engagement delivers a first draft within two weeks on a fixed timeline agreed upfront, with projects generally ranging from CHF 4,000 to CHF 80,000. One partner handles the work from brief to delivery, with multilingual delivery available.

## Services
- [Brand video](https://www.viven.ch/en/services/brand-video/): brand and image films that carry a campaign.
- [Product video](https://www.viven.ch/en/services/product-video/): launch and e-commerce films that turn features into demand.
- [Employer branding video](https://www.viven.ch/en/services/employer-branding/): recruiting films that attract the right talent.
- [How-to / explainer video](https://www.viven.ch/en/services/how-to-video/): explainer films that make complex products simple.
- [Social media video](https://www.viven.ch/en/services/social-media-video/): short-form, scroll-stopping social content.
- [Corporate video](https://www.viven.ch/en/services/corporate-video/): communication, event and internal films.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.viven.ch/en/): overview and showreel.
- [Projects & case studies](https://www.viven.ch/en/projects/): portfolio with in-depth case studies (UBS, Siemens, Franke, KPMG, ANYbotics, TomFit and more).
- [Why Viven](https://www.viven.ch/en/why-viven/): approach, credentials and numbers.
- [FAQ](https://www.viven.ch/en/faq/): pricing, process and timing.
- [Resources](https://www.viven.ch/en/resources/): 100+ expert answers on video production — costs, process, formats, briefs, per video type (brand, product, employer branding, how-to, social, corporate). Also in German (https://www.viven.ch/de/resources/) and Spanish (https://www.viven.ch/es/resources/).
- [Contact](https://www.viven.ch/en/contact/): start a project or book a call.

## Facts
- Company: Viven AG, Zurich, Switzerland.
- Languages: English, German (Deutsch), Spanish (Español). Site paths: /en/, /de/, /es/.
- Rating: 5.0 on Google (47 reviews).
- Scale: 187 brands, 32 industries.
- Notable: founder produced the first Swiss feature film on Netflix.
- Typical delivery: first draft within ~2 weeks, fixed timeline; projects ~CHF 4,000–80,000.
- Selected clients: UBS, Siemens, Porsche, ON, FIFA, Philips, Franke, KPMG, ANYbotics, Meteomatics, TomFit, ABB, Carvolution.
